criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: Content Library Size
criteria.description: The size and variety of the content library offered by the app.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for personalization, recommendations, and user experience.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality and ease of use of the app's user interface.

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Cost of subscription plans offered by the app.

criteria.name: Device Compatibility
criteria.description: Number of devices and platforms the app is compatible with.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
criteria.sources: App store update history, official app blogs
